title: Add Dollar Bank Account Withdrawal Feature

requirements.text: Add a backend data model and logic for a creator dollar bank account, including: storing a USD balance (as a float or integer cents), recording withdrawal transactions (amount, timestamp, status), and exposing methods to get the current balance, request a withdrawal, and list transaction history.

quotes: Dollar bank account nikal ke liye

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores a USD balance per authenticated user.
A withdraw method accepts an amount and creates a pending transaction record.
A getBalance method returns the current balance for the caller.
A getTransactionHistory method returns a list of past withdrawal records with amount, timestamp, and status.
Withdrawals that exceed the available balance are rejected with an error.

requirements.text: Create a Dollar Withdrawal page (route: /withdrawal) accessible from the sidebar and/or the Monetization page. The page must display the current USD balance, an input field for the withdrawal amount, a submit button to request a withdrawal, and a transaction history table showing past withdrawals with their amount, date, and status.

quotes: Dollar bank account nikal ke liye

acceptanceCriteria: The page is reachable via a /withdrawal route registered in App.tsx.
Current USD balance is fetched from the backend and displayed prominently.
User can enter a withdrawal amount and submit the request.
An error message is shown if the entered amount exceeds the available balance.
A table or list of past withdrawal transactions is displayed with amount, date, and status columns.
The page shows a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users.
Loading skeletons are displayed while data is fetching.
Offline error state is handled using the existing OfflineErrorState component.

requirements.text: Add a navigation link to the Dollar Withdrawal page in the sidebar (desktop) and the bottom navigation bar (mobile), using an appropriate wallet/withdrawal icon and label 'Withdraw'.

quotes: Dollar bank account nikal ke liye

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Withdraw' link with a wallet or cash icon appears in the desktop sidebar.
A 'Withdraw' tab appears in the BottomNav component on mobile.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All backend logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo).
Use the existing OfflineErrorState and NetworkStatusBanner components for offline handling.
nonGoals: Real money transfer or integration with any external payment gateway.
Stripe or any third-party payment processing.
Email or SMS notifications for withdrawal status changes.
Admin approval workflow for withdrawals (basic status tracking only).
